# Pythias Technologies

> All-in-one print-on-demand automation platform for custom apparel and merchandise businesses.

Pythias Technologies helps print shops, DTF studios, embroidery operations, and multi-marketplace sellers automate their entire fulfillment workflow — from order ingestion to shipping label generation.

## What We Do

- **Production Queue Management**: Automated job routing for DTF, embroidery, sublimation, and screen printing
- **Multi-Marketplace Order Sync**: Connects Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, Walmart, TikTok Shop, and more into a single production queue
- **Shipping Automation**: Generate USPS, FedEx, and UPS labels automatically based on order rules
- **Blank Inventory Tracking**: Real-time stock levels across all garment sizes, colors, and styles
- **Analytics & Reporting**: Production throughput, fulfillment rates, revenue by channel
- **Team Management**: Role-based access for production staff, shipping teams, and managers
- **Label & Barcode Printing**: Job tickets, shipping labels, and barcodes from one system

## Who Uses Pythias

Small to mid-size print-on-demand businesses that sell across multiple marketplaces and need to coordinate production, inventory, and shipping without manual data entry.

## Pages

- `/` — Home: platform overview, features, testimonials, pricing CTA
- `/blog` — Blog: articles on print-on-demand operations, automation, and marketplace strategy
- `/demo` — Book a demo call with the Pythias team
- `/login` — Sign in to the Pythias platform
